mapper.sql:
select rd.id, rd.create_at, rd.returned, rd.phone, rd.schedule_id,
sc.id as sc_id, sc.movie_id as sc_movie_id, sc.no as sc_no, sc.start_at as sc_start_at, sc.end_at as sc_end_at,
mv.movie_id as sc_mv_movie_id, mv.title as sc_mv_title, mv.runtime as sc_mv_runtime, mv.actors as sc_mv_actors, mv.director as sc_mv_director, mv.rating as sc_mv_rating, mv.genre as sc_mv_genre, mv.description as sc_mv_description, mv.create_at as sc_mv_create_at, mv.start_at as sc_mv_start_at, mv.end_at as sc_mv_end_at,
th.no as sc_th_no, th.policy_id as sc_th_policy_id, th.cleanup_time as sc_th_cleanup_time,
sp.policy_id as sc_th_sp_policy_id, sp.name as sc_th_sp_name, sp.cost as sc_th_sp_cost,
mb.phone as mb_phone, mb.create_at as mb_create_at, mb.point as mb_point,
st.id as st_id, st.reservation_id as st_reservation_id, st.seat_number as st_seat_number
from cinema_kiosk.reservation_details rd inner join cinema_kiosk.schedule sc on rd.schedule_id = sc.id INNER JOIN cinema_kiosk.movie mv ON sc.movie_id = mv.movie_id INNER JOIN cinema_kiosk.theater th ON sc.no = th.no INNER JOIN cinema_kiosk.seat_policy sp ON th.policy_id = sp.policy_id left join cinema_kiosk.member mb on rd.phone = mb.phone inner join cinema_kiosk.reservation_seat st on rd.id = st.reservation_id
